---
description: "Use when changing the ASP.NET Core web application, UI flows, controllers, views, forms, routing, or user-facing behavior. Requires opening the app in the VS Code embedded browser and manually testing the affected changes before finishing."
name: "Manual Web Testing"
applyTo: "EmployeeStructureSystem.Web/**"
---

# Manual Web Testing

- After making changes that affect the running application, start the app if needed and open it in the VS Code embedded browser.
- Manually exercise the specific flow changed by the task before concluding the work.
- Verify the visible result, navigation, validation, and any changed success or failure paths relevant to the task.
- If manual testing cannot be completed, state exactly what blocked it and what remains unverified.
